productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Chewang Slides Black Blue Flip Flops
description: The adidas Chewang slides you into that leisure-bound stride with a simple thong design to hold your foot in place, and a quick-drying EVA upper when things get a little wet and wild. UpperQuick-drying EVA upper for dry comfort for the feetThong construction to hold the forefoot in place, and added comfort and styleMidsoleEVA footbed with print for lightweight, stylish comfortDie-cut EVA sole unit for all-day relaxation of the feetOutsoleTextured outsole for grip and stabilityBranding on the outsole with four lugs along the impact guidance line to enhance grip Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
